response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 6+ years of proven experience across the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js). Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development—a required skill. Extensive software craftsmanship background, demonstrated through workshops and open-source work, aligns with quality expectations. Minor gaps in React experience (has Ember instead) and specific testing framework mentions are quickly addressable given the candidate's depth and current technical trajectory.
strengths: AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development expertise in current role—exact match for required technical skill
Proven mastery of TypeScript/Node.js across multiple senior-level and staff positions
Full-stack architecture and design capabilities demonstrated through staff roles and platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: React not mentioned in resume—extensive Ember.js experience instead (similar framework maturity, but not exact stack match)
Jest/Vitest/Playwright not explicitly listed despite clear TDD background and testing workshops
Nest.js and PostgreSQL not mentioned; primarily raw Node.js and GraphQL, though framework adaptability appears strong

key_factors.factor: Full-stack architecture mastery and staff-level seniority
